profile.ageBandHint: Ñu sàgg age range (amul sa date de naissance dëgg). Lii di jëfandikoo ngir Random Chat pairings bu dëgg.

profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email ngir yónnee notifications ci voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Jëfandikoo su sa audio greeting bi amul.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails yu sa Chatforia numéros yi ñu sàgg ci sa Voicemail inbox. Yow mëna jëfandikoo transcription ak tëggël ci plans buñu support.
profile.portHint: Yow laaj sàgg sa numéro bi? Yow mëna port ci Chatforia Wireless.

none.title: Amul famille léegi
none.body: Ngir sàgg Chatforia Family ak shared data pool, tambali Family plan.

data.heading: Shared data pool

invite.expiryHint: Link bi expires ci ay jours. Yow mëna sàgg bu bees léegi.

join.title: Jël famille
join.body: Ñu yónnee yow ngir jël Chatforia Family te sàgg sa data pool.
join.success: Yow jël na famille bi. Yow di sàgg data pool bi.
join.error: Mënaa yónnee yow ci famille bi. Invite bi mënaa baax walla expires.

premium.heading: Jël Premium
premium.description: Ubbi jëfandikoo yu dëgg & sàgg ads yi.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tambali ak free plan buñu ads. Jël ad-free ak Plus, walla ubbi jëfandikoo yu dëgg ak Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Tànn app plan, yónnee data packs walla sàgg data ak sa famille — ci benn barab.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tambali ak free plan buñu ads. Jël ad-free ak Plus, walla ubbi jëfandikoo yu dëgg ak Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Yónnee global eSIM data ngir Chatforia kontine su ñu amul Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Sàgg shared data pool ci sa famille te gérer usage yi ci benn barab.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Ubbi jëfandikoo yu dëgg & sàgg ads yi.

scheduleBanner.title: Subscription bi di jeex

free.title: Dëgg
free.desc: Tambali messaañ bu dëgg. Baax su yow di jéem Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 ak group chat, woo ak wideyo
features.media: Sàgg fotos, voix messages, ak short wideyos
features.ai: AI smart replies ak translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Messaañ yu ñëw ak privacy controls yu njëkk
features.ads: Dëgg forever ak ads ci app bi

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Lëpp yu dëgg, baaxul ads. Baax ci messaañ ak woo yépp.

features.forwarding: Tëggël woo ak SMS yi ci sa téléphone dëgg
features.support: Support bu gudd su njuumte am

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Mensuel)
premiumMonthly.desc: Chatforia bu dëgg: AI power tools, customizations, ak priority support.

features.themes: Ubbi themes yu dëgg ak customizations
features.ai: Premium AI tools ci rewrites, smart replies, ak summaries
features.support: Priority support su yow laaj ndimbal

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annuel)
premiumAnnual.desc: Sàgg yu bare su ñu facture annuel — ak extra themes, AI tools, ak priority support.

features.allPremium: Lëpp ci Premium Mensuel — ak extra themes
features.save25: Sàgg bu 30% su ñu facture mensuel
features.bestFor: Baax ci power users, remote workers, ak heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Sàgg 30% ak annuel – kontine ci dugal
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Facture upfront. Bàyyi léegi. Amul frais yu ñu tëggël.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Jëfandikoo yépp, ringtones, ak AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Facture upfront. Bàyyi léegi. Amul frais yu ñu tëggël.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Yónnee global data ngir Chatforia kontine su ñu amul Wi-Fi. Prix yi di yeesal su sa pays ak monnaie.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Tànn benn eSIM data pack ngir Chatforia kontine su ñu travel walla amul Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ñu mënaa jël data packs bu ndaw 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Data bu dëgg ci heavy use
features.throttle: Speeds mëna ndaw su usage bu bare
features.noContract: Pack bu benn yoon, amul contract

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs laaj eSIM-compatible device buñu lock. Disponibilité di yeesal su téléphone model, carrier, ak pays. Coverage ak speeds di yeesal su région.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Am 3 GB data bu dëgg — baax ci light messaging ak woo yu ndaw.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, ak woo yu ndaw

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Am 5 GB data bu dëgg ci trips, commuting, ak VoIP calls.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, ak maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Am 10 GB data bu dëgg ci heavy chat, calls, ak wideyo ci Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, wideyo, ak hotspot
large.aria: Jël Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Data usage di yeesal su yow jëfandikoo Chatforia (voix, wideyo, media, ak apps yu bees).

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Sàgg benn data pool ci sa famille. Benn facture, multiple comptes, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Am 20 GB shared data — baax ci 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Am 40 GB shared data — baax ci 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Am 80 GB shared data — baax ci familles yu bare di jëfandikoo.

feature.shared: Shared data pool ci sa famille
feature.fairUse: Subject ci fair-use policy ak local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs sàgg walla top up shared data pool. Yow mëna yónnee walla sàgg members léegi.
family.footnote: Family packs sàgg benn data pool ci linked Chatforia comptes. Disponibilité ak limits di yeesal su sa pays ak local regulations.

why.title: Lu tax nit ñi di jël Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia di jël numéro de téléphone dëgg, translation bu dëgg, ak yoon bu dëgg ngir bàyyi ads.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads yu ndaw ci Free, Plus upgrade bu dëgg, ak Premium tools TextNow amul.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App bu moderne, global design, ak translation bu dëgg au lieu de call forwarding yu njëkk.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Tëggël numéros de téléphone dëgg — amul dëgg app users — ak AI ak status. Baax su yow di jël apps yu bees yu TextFree walla TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison bi su publicly available info te mëna yeesal. Apps yu bees yu free-texting yu TextFree walla TextMe di yeesal TextNow.

free.q: Free plan bi dëgg bu dëgg?
free.a: Waaw. Free plan di jël Chatforia numéro, woo, ak messaañ ak ads. Yow mëna kontine ci Free bu yow laaj, walla upgrade ngir sàgg ads ak mëna jëfandikoo yu bare.

plusPremium.q: Lan moo di différence ci Plus ak Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus di sàgg ads te yeesal message history — baax ci usage yépp. Premium di yónnee customizations yu bare, AI tools ci rewrites ak replies, ak priority support ci heavy users.

esim.q: Lan moo di jëfandikoo eSIM data packs?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile di jëfandikoo global eSIM coverage. Disponibilité di yeesal su sa pays ak device. Yow mëna xool options yi su ñu activate ci app bi.

cancel.q: Mënaa bàyyi walla yeesal plans léegi?
cancel.a: Waaw. Yow mëna gérer walla bàyyi sa subscription ci billing page ci app bi. Changes di jëfandikoo ci jeex ci sa billing period.

family.q: Lan moo di jëfandikoo Family packs?
family.a: Family packs di sàgg shared data pool ci multiple Chatforia comptes. Benn nit di facture, te yow mëna yónnee walla sàgg members te sàgg limits ci nit yépp.

gettingStarted.title: Tambali
gettingStarted.subtitle: Bees ci Chatforia? Guide bi di xool li essentiel ngir yow mëna jëfandikoo ci minutes.

alert.text: Guide bi di gudd su ñu launch features yu bees. Su amul li ñu laaj, yónnee ñu via

section2.title: 2) Tambali messaañ
section2.item1: Sàgg DM walla Group te tëggël sa messaañ bu njëkk.
section2.item2: Jëfandikoo instant translation ngir messaañ ci lammiñ yu 100+.
section2.item3: Jéem disappearing messages ak read receipts ci Profil → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Jël yu bare
section3.item1: Yow mëna upgrade ci paid plan léegi ci app bi.
section3.item2: Su yow dugal, yow mëna sàgg devices yu bees ak sàgg encrypted backups ci Settings ci app bi.

account.q: Lan moo di sàgg walla tëggël sa kont?
account.a: Yónnee app bi walla jëfandikoo web, cliquer “Sàgg kont”, vérifié sa email/téléphone. Ngir tëggël, jëfandikoo “Fàtte baat”.

privacy.a: Waaw. Messaañ ak woo yi end-to-end encrypted ci yoon bi. Yow ak recipient yépp mëna jàng.

translate.a: Jëfandikoo “Auto-translate” ci Settings → Appearance & Language. Ñu translate on-device su supported, walla ci secure APIs ak minimal metadata.

contact.a: Yónnee ñu ci support@chatforia.com. Yónnee screenshots ak sa app version.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Merci — équipe bi di répondre ci email.

intro.body: Privacy Policy bi di xool lan moo di Chatforia (“ñu”, “ñu”) jël, jëfandikoo, ak sàgg info su yow jëfandikoo apps ak services. Ñu sàgg Chatforia ngir amul data bu ñu mëna jël.

infoWeCollect.title: Info bu ñu jël
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/téléphone) ngir sàgg ak sécuriser sa kont.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messaañ/woo) end-to-end encrypted; ñu mënaa jàng.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage yu crash logs, device type, walla analytics yu ndaw ngir yeesal performance.

sms.title: Numéros de téléphone mobile ak SMS
sms.body: Su yow jël numéro de téléphone mobile, ñu jëfandikoo ngir account verification, login alerts, ak user-to-user messaging via SMS su supported. Ñu mëna yónnee transactional SMS messages buñu jëfandikoo ci sa kont ak activité ci Chatforia. Yow mëna bàyyi SMS messages léegi su yow répondre ak opt-out keyword (e.g. “STOP”) walla yeesal notification preferences ci app bi. Ñu mënaa jël sa numéro walla jëfandikoo ngir marketing yu unrelated.
sms.addRecipient: Yónnee recipient bi ci kaw ngir tambali…

howWeUse.title: Lan moo di ñu jëfandikoo info
howWeUse.provide: Jëfandikoo ak sécuriser service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sàgg
sharing.body: Ñu mënaa jël personal data. Ñu mëna sàgg data yu ndaw ak processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) ci contrats bu dëgg.

rights.title: Sa droits
rights.body: Su sa région (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), yow mëna laaj access, correction, deletion, walla opt-out ci certains processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & sécurité
retention.body: Ñu sàgg li essentiel ngir jëfandikoo service te jëfandikoo sécurité bu industry-standard. E2E content mënaa decrypt.

children.title: Enfants
children.body: Chatforia buñu sàgg ci enfants bu ndaw 13 (walla su sa local law).

changes.title: Yeesal yi
changes.body: Ñu mëna yónnee updates fii te yeesal “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Su yow jëfandikoo Chatforia yow di accepté Terms bi. Su yow acceptéul, jëfandikoo service bi.

accounts.title: Comptes
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Jël info bu dëgg te sécuriser credentials.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Yow mooy responsable ci activité yi ci sa kont.

acceptableUse.title: Jëfandikoo bu baax
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Amul contenu bu illegal, abusive, walla infringing; amul spam walla automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Su yow jël numéro de téléphone mobile, yow di accepté Chatforia mëna yónnee SMS messages buñu jëfandikoo ci sa kont ak jëfandikoo service, e.g. login alerts, security notifications, ak messages buñu jëfandikoo ci conversations yi. Ñu mënaa jëfandikoo SMS ngir promotional marketing su yow acceptéul. Standard message & data rates mëna am. Yow mëna bàyyi SMS messages léegi su yow répondre ak opt-out keyword (e.g. “STOP”) walla yeesal notification settings ci app bi.

yourContent.title: Sa contenu
yourContent.body: Yow di sàgg droits ci sa contenu. Yow di jël ñu droits bu essentiel ngir jëfandikoo service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & responsabilité
disclaimer.body: Service bi “as is” baaxul warranties. Su law di jëfandikoo, Chatforia buñu responsable ci indirect walla consequential damages.

changes.title: Yeesal yi
changes.body: Ñu mëna yeesal terms bi; su yow kontine jëfandikoo su yeesal yi, yow di accepté.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia mënaa jël personal information. California residents mëna sàgg requests ci CPRA ak bouton bi ci suuf.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia di jëfandikoo cookies yu ndaw (e.g., session, security). Ñu mënaa jëfandikoo third-party ads cookies. Gérer cookies ci sa navigateur settings.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Amul numéro. Tànn benn ci area code ngir tambali tëggël.

startChatModal.title: Tambali chat
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Dugal tur, username, numéro, walla email…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Dugal username walla numéro te cliquer Seet.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Phone/email yi di mëna jëfandikoo su yow sàgg ñu ci contacts.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Mënaa tambali chat ak selected recipients.

sounds.freeNotice: Yow ci Free — premium tones yi xool nañu mais locked. Upgrade ngir ubbi yépp.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Gérer translation, smart replies, ak ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Xool tëkk yu njëkk ak translation
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Tëggël last messages yi (sanitized) ci AI ngir suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Su on, suggestions yu AI yi di mask flagged words

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options ngir jëfandikoo Chatforia bu dëgg baaxul son.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Tambali ci normal size. Yeesal su yow laaj tëkk yu gudd ci accessibility settings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts ci messaañ & woo
Xool banners ak title blink ngir amul miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate ci messaañ yu bees (su supported)
Trigger device vibration ak notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash écran ci incoming call
Brief bright flash su call bi di woo.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Yónnee transcript ci audio messages yi ñu yónnee.
accessibilitySettings.changesSavedInstantly: Yeesal yi sàgg na ci yoon bi.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Xool banners ak title blink ngir amul miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate ci messaañ yu bees (su supported)
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash su call bi di woo.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Sàgg ciphertext yépp ci server. Di disable AI/Translate ak moderation previews.

help.title: Ndimbal
help.howCanWeHelp: Lan moo di ñu mëna ndimbal?

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Seet ak alias, tur, username, walla numéro
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Ay yoon yu gudd ngir tambali.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Sàgg sa invite link ngir tambali chat ci yoon bi.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Kontine tëggël ci mobile ak Chatforia ci iOS ak Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Sa messaañ yi di dëkk ci web ak mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Rencontrer nit bu bees ci yoon bi. Ñu mëna pair yow te ubbi temporary chat room. Chat anonyme bu njëkk. Yónnee Friend su baax.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Ñu sàgg age range (amul sa date de naissance dëgg). Lii di jëfandikoo ngir Random Chat pairings bu dëgg. Ngir pair ak nit ñi (amul RiaBot), sàgg sa age band ci Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Sàgg sa age range ci Profil → Age & Random Chat ngir pair ak nit ñi.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ngir pair ak nit ñi (amul RiaBot), sàgg sa age band ci Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Rencontrer nit bu bees ci yoon bi, walla tànn chat ak Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Sàgg sa age range ci Profil → Age & Random Chat ngir pair ak nit ñi.
